entity.summary: Concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange on the Endurance chain with current liquidity and recent trading activity.
entity.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero TVL and recent trading volume. No canonical public website was recovered in this review.

evidence.title: Catalist DEX protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Profile identifies Catalist DEX as an Endurance CLMM and reports current TVL and recent volume.

evidence.title: Catalist DEX volume adapter
evidence.notes: Protocol-specific adapter corroborates the exchange identity and on-chain volume tracking.
